data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing decision time by reducing the number of choices presented.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements placed strategically for easy interaction.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons and icons

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetically pleasing designs that enhance user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Visually appealing interfaces with consistent themes

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs aligned with user expectations based on their past experiences.
data.technical_spec: Familiar layout patterns and UI elements

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Complex information presented in chunks to improve comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Clear segmentation of content and information hierarchy
